methodology_notes: Analyzes 22,000+ confirmed data breaches and 31,000+ security incidents across 145 countries. Timeline: Nov 1, 2024 through Oct 31, 2025. Single source for industry-wide breach pattern reference. Global sample but US-tilt in contributor base.

distributions.context: Vulnerability exploitation rose to 31% of initial access vector (up from 20% prior period). Phishing stable at 16%. Credential abuse 13% as initial vector but 39% somewhere in attack chain.
Credential abuse appears at some point in the attack chain in 39% of breaches
Ransomware comprised 48% of all breaches in 2026 (up from 44% prior)
69% of ransomware victims did not pay demanded ransoms
Half of ransomware victims with prior credential leaks experienced attacks within 95 days
Third parties now account for nearly half of all breaches (a 60% year-on-year increase in third-party involvement)
Only 23% of third-party organizations fully remediated MFA gaps
Only 26% of CISA Known Exploited Vulnerabilities were fully remediated (down from 38% prior period)
Median patch time rose to 43 days, up from 32 days year-over-year
Organizations require approximately 8 months to fix half of permission misconfigurations in third-party systems (unit: months)
Shadow AI increased fourfold YoY; now the third most common non-malicious insider action detected in DLP datasets
